title: Shimajiro and Fufu's Great Adventure: Save the Seven-Colored Flower!
original_title: しまじろうとフフのだいぼうけん 〜すくえ!七色の花〜
overview: Shimajiro to Fufu no Daibōken: Sukue! Nanairo no Hana (しまじろうと フフの だいぼうけん ～すくえ！七色の花～?, Shimajiro and Fufu's Great Adventure: Save the Seven-Colored Flower!) is a 2013 Japanese children's live action/anime film. It's the first film to feature the character Shimajirō. The film is directed by Isamu Hirabayashi and was release on March 15, 2013.
